title: 日本ダービーの後に・リーズン

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I heard her voice while I was running.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: DEEERRRBYYYYY!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I can't count how many times all her silly yelling
has cheered me up.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: But today, it terrified me.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Why isn't anything working? Why can't I...

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Tic-ke-zo! Tic-ke-zo! Tic-ke-zo! Tic-ke-zo!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: WOOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeaaah! I did it, I did it, I did it! I WON!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much, everyone! I did it! I really did
it!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text: Congratulations on this huge win, Winning Ticket!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Thank you! I'm so, so, so happy right now!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I poured my heart and soul into this race. Winning
the Derby has been my dream for so long, and I
trained as hard as I could for it.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sob... I did it all for the sake of this victory!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text: And you did fantastic!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna work even harder! I'm gonna keep
giving my fans the most exciting races possible!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your support, everyone! I hope
you'll continue to cheer me on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: She's planning to become even faster than that?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: If she does, then I'll... I'll...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Thanks, but... I wasn't good enough—I lost.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's still reeling from the loss and remains silent.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What can I say to make her feel better? It reminds
me of before...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide looks just as despondent as she
did after the Satsuki Sho.
choice_data_list:
Do you remember what happened at the Satsuki
Sho?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her shoulders jump. It appears she does, and her
current worries have some connection to it.
choice_data_list: What have you been thinking about since then?
What have you been thinking about since then?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Talk about rubbing salt in the wound...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I can't stop thinking about how I keep losing.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I've lost twice now. Once to Taishin at the Satsuki
Sho, and again to Ticket at the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
We planned for so many scenarios and tried to
anticipate so many variables. But they just have
something I lack.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I don't know what to do.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Whatever that something is, if it's not simply an
oversight... If it's something I'm intrinsically
missing, then beating them is impossible.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
choice_data_list:
Let's factor that "something" into the equation,
then!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: What?
choice_data_list: I know you can figure this out!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Where are you getting that confidence from? I
don't have the foggiest idea what it could be, so
how am I supposed to solve for it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide is extremely smart. Smart enough
to figure out most things on her own.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's why she always tries to solve everything alone,
even when facing an insurmountable challenge.
But...
choice_data_list: You can still give it a shot.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: You can't be serious.
choice_data_list:
Hey, if you plug in enough variables, you'll
eventually nail it, right?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You really think I can find the right answer by
repeatedly testing a baseless calculation?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
That's absolutely absurd. Not only does it make
no sense, it's completely illogical.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Only someone utterly desperate to solve an
equation would try something like that.
choice_data_list: Which is why I suggested it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: You know me too well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We stay and talk in the waiting room for a while.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We speak about why Biwa Hayahide suddenly
feels such a gap between herself and her two
rivals, and what she can do about it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I've identified what our priority should be based
on our discussion.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Equipping me with the iron will to improve. I need
you to think back for a second.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Tch... I'm fine. I can keep going.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You saw Hayahide's race. She was amazing. I want
to win harder than ever, but...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I poured my heart and soul into this race. Winning
the Derby has been my dream for so long, and I
trained as hard as I could for it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
My hypothesis is that Ticket and Taishin's
willingness to do whatever it takes to win is the
source of their drive and determination.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Good. I have a favor to ask you.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Going forward, don't be afraid to push me to my limits. In fact, I want you to make me work harder.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure. I don't ever want to taste defeat again,
and to ensure that I don't, I need to push myself
harder!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She starts running again, this time with a new
strategy.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I won't ever lose again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, with a determination bordering on
obsession...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide sets her sights on the final race of
the Classic Triple Crown tour—the Kikuka Sho.
